title: REDWOOD INN - 211info
text: ROGUE RETREAT REDWOOD INN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers transitional shelter. Features 21 medical respite spaces specifically tailored to those needing safe and sanitary environments to heal. Also provides 23 studio apartments dedicated to individuals and families in a transitional housing program. 711 E Main Street Suite 25 Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Individuals and couples age 18 and older, and families with minor children Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 499-0880 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 499-0880 Main phone Main phone (541) 499-0880 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information FEES: Vary DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of East Main St and Genessee St in Medford, OR. Gray/blue two-story building. Services: Transitional Housing/Shelter Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Families Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - APARTMENTS HOUSING/SHELTER - CROSSINGS HOUSING/SHELTER - HAVENS HOUSING/SHELTER - HOPE VILLAGE HOUSING/SHELTER - KELLY SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROGUE RETREAT
